visual_description: A shaky, close-up shot focuses on a white bathroom sink. A person's hand, wearing a dark blue long-sleeved shirt, reaches into the frame and turns off a chrome faucet. The camera pans slightly, revealing a mirror on the right and a white towel hanging on a rack in the background. The audio opens with a sudden, sharp, metallic clang, like a knife being slammed onto a hard surface. The camera cuts to a medium shot of a woman with dark, disheveled hair and a bloody cut on her forehead. She is wearing a blue jacket over a light-colored turtleneck. With a look of intense anger, she holds a large kitchen knife in her right hand, pointing it forward. The background is a simple, tiled bathroom wall. This is immediately followed by a high-pitched, piercing, and frantic scream, filled with pure terror and rage. The camera angle shifts slightly, showing the woman from a side profile as she continues to hold the knife, her expression still one of rage. The shot changes to a close-up of a man with a worried and fearful expression. He has dark hair and a small cut on his forehead. He is wearing a plaid shirt under a maroon jacket.
